nasb.text: I have also given you what you have not asked, both riches and honor, so that there will not be any among the kings like you all your days.

esv.text: I give you also what you have not asked, both riches and honor, so that no other king shall compare with you, all your days.

cnv.text: 連你所沒有求的，我也賜給你，就是財富、尊榮，以至你一生的年日，在列王之中沒有一人能像你。

ccb.text: 你没有求富贵和尊荣，但我会一并赐给你，使你有生之年在列王中无人能比。
